issues.description: Effect is missing the 'Look at 5 cards' mechanic. DSL should include a viewing/searching action limited to top 5 cards, not arbitrary deck search.
Filter is 'Any' but should restrict to {Navy} type cards, excluding [Tashigi] by name.
Missing action to place remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order. Current DSL only searches and adds to hand, ignoring the deck ordering requirement.
SearchDeck action does not support the 'up to 1' constraint (optional reveal mechanic). DSL lacks proper quantification for optional selection.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Navy} type card other than [Tashigi] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
